_provenance.source: Five packs derived VERBATIM from packages/contracts/pack-manifests/ (lang-en.json, locale-ph.json, payer-philhealth.json, regulatory-philhealth-doh.json, standards-ph.json). Two additional packs fabricated from OpenAPI PackSummary/PackDetail schemas for US market coverage.
_provenance.generatedFor: Static review prototype — first 5 packs are real contract data, last 2 are fabricated

items.description: Baseline English language pack. Provides UI strings, VistA dialog translations, terminal prompts, and menu translations in English.

capabilityContributions.description: English baseline is required for all language-support capabilities.

items.description: Locale conventions for the Philippines market. Configures date formats (DD/MM/YYYY), currency (PHP), address formatting, number formatting.

configurationKeys.description: Date display format for PH locale (DD/MM/YYYY).
Number formatting conventions for PH locale.

capabilityContributions.description: PH locale conventions required for correct date, currency, and number display.

items.description: Regulatory compliance rules for the Philippines market as mandated by DOH and PhilHealth. Covers UHC Act (RA 11223), Data Privacy Act (RA 10173), and PhilHealth eClaims requirements.

capabilityContributions.description: PH regulatory compliance is not claimable without this pack active and verified.

items.description: National healthcare standards for the Philippines market. Covers ICD-10-CM diagnosis coding and RVS procedure coding.

dependencies.rationale: PH coding standards are part of the DOH regulatory framework.

configurationKeys.description: Sets ICD-10-CM as the diagnosis coding system.
Sets RVS as the procedure coding system for PH.

capabilityContributions.description: PH coding standards require ICD-10-CM + RVS coding tables.

items.description: Payer integration pack for PhilHealth, the Philippine national health insurance program. Covers eClaims submission, eligibility checks, and remittance parsing.

dependencies.rationale: PhilHealth claims require DOH regulatory compliance context.
PhilHealth claims require ICD-10-CM and RVS coding per national standards.

configurationKeys.description: Sets PhilHealth CF1-CF4 as the claim format.
Sets PhilHealth as the active government payer.

capabilityContributions.description: PhilHealth claims capability requires this payer pack and its adapter.

items.description: US HIPAA regulatory compliance. Fabricated for review prototype demonstration.
Cardiology specialty variation pack. Fabricated for review prototype demonstration of specialty pack family.
